cfg.B2AccessKeyID,\n75\t\t\tSecretKey:   cfg.B2SecretAccessKey,\n76\t\t\tCFDomain:    cfg.CFDomain,\n77\t\t})\n78\t\tif err != nil {\n79\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create B2 backend: to create key manager: %w\", err)\n106\t\t}\n107\t\n108\t\t// Create canary monitor\n109\t\tcanaryMonitor := canary.NewMonitor(canary.Config{\n110\t\t\tBackend:    b2Backend,\n111\t\t\tBucket: *b2keys.Client\n133\t\tif cfg.Bucket != \"\" {\n134\t\t\t// Bucket-scoped configuration: application key is restricted to a single bucket\n135\t\t\t// and cannot call account-level B2 API endpoints (like b2_authorize_account).\n136\t\t\t// Key management is unavailable in this mode, which is expected and intentional.\n137\t\t\tlogger.Info(\"B2 key management disabled (application key is bucket-scoped)\")\n138\t\t} else {\n139\t\t\t// No bucket restriction: attempt to create B2 keys client for account-level operations\n140\t\t\t// Extract account ID from the key ID (B2 key IDs are in format accountIdKeyId)\n141\t\t\t// The account ID is the first 12 characters\n142\t\t\taccountID := cfg.B2AccessKeyID\n143\t\t\tif len(accountID) > 12 {\n144\t\t\t\taccountID = cfg.ManifestEnabled {\n162\t\t\tmanifestIdx = manifest.New()\n163\t\t\t// ListRaw bypasses the .armor/ filter so manifest keys are discoverable.\n164\t\t\tlister := func(ctx context.Context, prefix, token string) ([]string, string, error) {\n165\t\t\t\tresult, lerr := b2Backend.ListRaw(ctx, cfg.Bucket, prefix, \"\", token, 1000)\n166\t\t\t\tif lerr != nil {\n167\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, \"\", lerr\n168\t\t\t\t}\n169\t\t\t\tkeys := make([]string, len(result.Objects))\n170\t\t\t\tfor i, obj := range result.Objects {\n171\t\t\t\t\tkeys[i] = obj.Key\n172\t\t\t\t}\n173\t\t\t\treturn keys, result.NextToken, nil\n174\t\t\t}\n175\t\t\t// Fetch snapshot and delta blobs via Cloudflare for free egress and edge\n176\t\t\t// caching. Fall back to direct B2 if no Cloudflare domain is configured.\n177\t\t\tfetcher := func(ctx context.Context, key string) ([]byte, error) {\n178\t\t\t\tvar body io.ReadCloser\n179\t\t\t\tvar ferr error\n180\t\t\t\tif cfg.CFDomain != \"\" {\n181\t\t\t\t\tbody, _, ferr = b2Backend.Get(ctx, cfg.Bucket, key)\n182\t\t\t\t} else {\n183\t\t\t\t\tbody, _, ferr = b2Backend.GetDirect(ctx, cfg.Bucket, key)\n184\t\t\t\t}\n185\t\t\t\tif ferr != nil {\n186\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, ferr\n187\t\t\t\t}\n188\t\t\t\tdefer body.Close()\n189\t\t\t\treturn io.ReadAll(body)\n190\t\t\t}\n191\t\t\tloadStart := time.Now()\n192\t\t\tif loadErr := manifest.Load(context.Background(), manifestIdx, cfg.ManifestPrefix, cfg.WriterID, lister, fetcher); loadErr != nil {\n193\t\t\t\tlogger.WithFields(map[string]interface{}{\n194\t\t\t\t\t\"error\": loadErr.Error(),\n195\t\t\t\t}).Warn(\"manifest startup load failed — continuing with empty manifest index\")\n196\t\t\t\tmanifestIdx = manifest.New() // reset to empty on error\n197\t\t\t} else {\n198\t\t\t\tlogger.WithFields(map[string]interface{}{\n199\t\t\t\t\t\"entries\":  manifestIdx.Len(),\n200\t\t\t\t\t\"seq\":      manifestIdx.Seq(),\n201\t\t\t\t\t\"duration\": time.Since(loadStart).String(),\n202\t\t\t\t}).Info(\"manifest index loaded\")\n203\t\t\t}\n204\t\t}\n205\t\n206\t\t// Create and start the manifest writer (async delta persistence to B2).\n207\t\t// Uploads go direct to B2 (free ingress); no Cloudflare path needed here.\n208\t\tvar manifestWriter *manifest.Writer\n209\t\tvar manifestCompactor *manifest.Compactor\n210\t\tif manifestIdx != nil {\n211\t\t\tuploader := func(ctx context.Context, key string, data []byte) error {\n212\t\t\t\treturn b2Backend.Put(ctx, cfg.Bucket, key, bytes.NewReader(data), int64(len(data)), nil)\n213\t\t\t}\n214\t\t\tmanifestWriter = manifest.NewWriter(manifestIdx, cfg.ManifestPrefix, cfg.WriterID, uploader, 0)\n215\t\n216\t\t\t// Create compactor that lists and batch-deletes via the B2 backend.\n217\t\t\tlisterForCompactor := func(ctx context.Context, prefix, token string) ([]string, string, error) {\n218\t\t\t\tresult, lerr := b2Backend.ListRaw(ctx, cfg.Bucket, prefix, \"\", token, 1000)\n219\t\t\t\tif lerr != nil {\n220\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, \"\", lerr\n221\t\t\t\t}\n222\t\t\t\tkeys := make([]string, len(result.Objects))\n223\t\t\t\tfor i, obj := range result.Objects {\n224\t\t\t\t\tkeys[i] = obj.Key\n225\t\t\t\t}\n226\t\t\t\treturn keys, result.NextToken, nil\n227\t\t\t}\n228\t\t\tdeleter := func(ctx context.Context, keys []string) error {\n229\t\t\t\treturn b2Backend.DeleteObjects(ctx, cfg.Bucket, keys)\n230\t\t\t}\n231\t\t\tcompactionInterval := time.Duration(cfg.ManifestCompactionInterval) * time.Second\n232\t\t\tmanifestCompactor = manifest.NewCompactor(\n233\t\t\t\tmanifestIdx,\n234\t\t\t\tcfg.ManifestPrefix,\n235\t\t\t\tcfg.WriterID,\n236\t\t\t\tuploader,\n237\t\t\t\tlisterForCompactor,\n238\t\t\t\tdeleter,\n239\t\t\t\tcompactionInterval,\n240\t\t\t\tcfg.ManifestCompactionThreshold,\n241\t\t\t)\n242\t\n243\t\t\t// Wire writer → compactor: after each delta flush, notify compactor.\n244\t\t\tmanifestWriter.SetOnFlush(manifestCompactor.NotifyDelta)\n245\t\n246\t\t\tmanifestWriter.Start(context.Background())\n247\t\t\tmanifestCompactor.Start(context.Background())\n248\t\t\tlogger.Info(\"manifest writer and compactor started\")\n249\t\t}\n250\t\n251\t\treturn &Server{\n252\t\t\tconfig:         cfg,\n253\t\t\tbackend:        b2Backend,\n254\t\t\tcache:          cache,\n255\t\t\tfooterCache: provenanceMgr,\n261\t\t\tpresigner:      presigner,\n262\t\t\tb2keys:         b2keysClient,\n263\t\t\tdashboard:      dash,\n264\t\t\tmanifest:          manifestIdx,\n265\t\t\tmanifestWriter:    manifestWriter,\n266\t\t\tmanifestCompactor: manifestCompactor,\n267\t\t\tmetrics:        metrics.DefaultMetrics,\n268\t\t\trequestTracker: metrics.DefaultRequestTracker,\n269\t\t\tlogger:         logger,\n270\t\t}, nil\n271\t}\n272\t\n273\t// manifestRecorder implements handlers.ManifestRecorder. It updates the\n274\t// in-memory index synchronously (so subsequent HeadObject calls see the new\n275\t// state immediately) and enqueues the op for async B2 delta persistence.\n276\ttype manifestRecorder struct {\n277\t\tidx    *manifest.Index\n278\t\twriter *manifest.Writer\n279\t}\n280\t\n281\tfunc (m *manifestRecorder) RecordPut(bucket, key string, size int64, sha256Hex string, iv, wrappedDEK []byte, blockSize int, contentType, etag string) {\n282\t\tentry := &manifest.Entry{\n283\t\t\tPlaintextSize:   size,\n284\t\t\tPlaintextSHA256: sha256Hex,\n285\t\t\tIV:              iv,\n286\t\t\tWrappedDEK:      wrappedDEK,\n287\t\t\tBlockSize:       blockSize,\n288\t\t\tContentType:     contentType,\n289\t\t\tETag:            etag,\n290\t\t\tLastModified:    time.Now().UTC(),\n291\t\t}\n292\t\tm.idx.Put(bucket, key, entry)\n293\t\tm.writer.EnqueuePut(bucket, key, entry)\n294\t}\n295\t\n296\tfunc (m *manifestRecorder) RecordDelete(bucket, key string) {\n297\t\tm.idx.Delete(bucket, key)\n298\t\tm.writer.EnqueueDelete(bucket, key)\n299\t}\n300\t\n301\tfunc (m *manifestRecorder) Lookup(bucket, key string) (*handlers.ManifestEntry, bool) {\n302\t\tentry, ok := m.idx.Get(bucket, key)\n303\t\tif !ok {\n304\t\t\treturn nil, false\n305\t\t}\n306\t\treturn &handlers.ManifestEntry{\n307\t\t\tPlaintextSize: entry.PlaintextSize,\n308\t\t\tContentType:   entry.ContentType,\n309\t\t\tETag:          entry.ETag,\n310\t\t\tLastModified:  entry.LastModified,\n311\t\t\tIV:            entry.IV,\n312\t\t\tWrappedDEK:    entry.WrappedDEK,\n313\t\t\tBlockSize:     entry.BlockSize,\n314\t\t}, true\n315\t}\n316\t\n317\t// StopManifestWriter flushes any pending manifest ops and stops the async writer.\n318\tfunc (s *Server) StopManifestWriter() {\n319\t\tif s.manifestWriter != nil {\n320\t\t\ts.manifestWriter.Stop()\n321\t\t\ts.logger.Info(\"manifest writer stopped\")\n322\t\t}\n323\t}\n324\t\n325\t// StopManifestCompactor stops the background compaction goroutine.\n326\tfunc (s *Server) StopManifestCompactor() {\n327\t\tif s.manifestCompactor != nil {\n328\t\t\ts.manifestCompactor.Stop()\n329\t\t\ts.logger.Info(\"manifest compactor stopped\")\n330\t\t}\n331\t}\n332\t\n333\t// StartCanary starts the canary monitor.\n334\t// It should be called after the server is created.\n335\t// When ARMOR_CANARY_DISABLED=true, the monitor is not started and /readyz\n336\t// always returns 200 regardless of B2 reachability.\n337\tfunc (s *Server) StartCanary(ctx context.Context) {\n338\t\tif s.canary == nil || s.canaryStarted {\n339\t\t\treturn\n340\t\t}\n341\t\tif s.canaryDisabled {\n342\t\t\ts.logger.Info(\"Canary monitor disabled (ARMOR_CANARY_DISABLED=true)\")\n343\t\t\treturn\n344\t\t}\n345\t\ts.canaryStarted = true\n346\t\ts.canary.Start(ctx)\n347\t\ts.logger.Info(\"Canary monitor started\")\n348\t}\n349\t\n350\t// StopCanary stops the canary monitor.\n351\tfunc (s *Server) StopCanary() {\n352\t\tif s.canary != nil && s.canaryStarted {\n353\t\t\ts.canary.Stop()\n354\t\t\ts.logger.Info(\"Canary monitor stopped\")\n355\t\t}\n356\t}\n357\t\n358\t// Handler returns the main S3 API handler.\n359\tfunc (s *Server) Handler() http.Handler {\n360\t\tmux := http.NewServeMux()\n361\t\n362\t\t// Health endpoints\n363\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/healthz\", s.healthz)\n364\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/readyz\", s.readyz)\n365\t\n366\t\t// Share endpoint for pre-signed URLs (public, no auth required)\n367\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/share/\", s.handleShare)\n368\t\n369\t\t// S3 operations\n370\t\th := handlers.New(s.config, s.backend, s.cache, s.footerCache, s.keyManager, s.listCache)\n371\t\n372\t\t// Wire up provenance if available\n373\t\tif s.provenance != nil {\n374\t\t\th.WithProvenance(s.provenance)\n375\t\t}\n376\t\n377\t\t// Wire up manifest recorder if enabled\n378\t\tif s.manifest != nil && s.manifestWriter != nil {\n379\t\t\th.WithManifest(&manifestRecorder{idx: s.manifest, writer: s.manifestWriter})\n380\t\t}\n381\t\n382\t\t// Bucket operations\n383\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/\", s.wrapHandler(h.HandleRoot))\n384\t\n385\t\treturn mux\n386\t}\n387\t\n388\t// AdminHandler returns the admin API handler.\n389\tfunc (s *Server) AdminHandler() http.Handler {\n390\t\tmux := http.NewServeMux()\n391\t\n392\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/healthz\", s.healthz)\n393\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/admin/key/verify\", s.verifyKey)\n394\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/admin/key/rotate\", s.rotateKey)\n395\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/admin/key/export\", s.exportKey)\n396\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/armor/canary\", s.canaryHandler)\n397\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/armor/audit\", s.audit)\n398\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/admin/presign\", s.handlePresign)\n399\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/admin/b2/keys\", s.handleB2Keys)           // GET=List, POST=Create\n400\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/admin/b2/keys/\", s.handleB2KeyDelete)     // DELETE=Delete by ID\n401\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/metrics\", s.metrics.Handler())\n402\t\n403\t\t// Dashboard routes\n404\t\tif s.dashboard != nil {\n405\t\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/dashboard\", s.dashboard.Handler())\n406\t\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/dashboard/\", s.dashboard.Handler()) // For prefix navigation\n407\t\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/dashboard/object\", s.dashboard.ObjectDetailHandler())\n408\t\t\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/dashboard/metrics\", s.dashboard.MetricsHandler())\n409\t\t}\n410\t\n411\t\treturn mux\n412\t}\n413\t\n414\t// healthz returns the health status.\n415\t// This is the liveness probe — it only checks that the process is alive.\n416\t// Backend connectivity is checked by /readyz (the readiness probe).\n417\tfunc (s *Server) healthz(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n418\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n419\t\tw.Write([]byte(\"OK\"))\n420\t}\n421\t\n422\t// readyz returns the readiness status.\n423\t// When the canary monitor is running and not disabled, its in-memory health\n424\t// state is the sole signal — no backend call is made. When the canary is\n425\t// disabled (ARMOR_CANARY_DISABLED=true), /readyz always returns 200 and the\n426\t// liveness probe (/healthz) is the sole health guard. When the canary is not\n427\t// configured, the manifest writer's last flush is used as the health signal.\n428\tfunc (s *Server) readyz(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n429\t\t// When canary is explicitly disabled, skip all backend checks.\n430\t\tif s.canaryDisabled {\n431\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n432\t\t\tw.Write([]byte(\"Ready\"))\n433\t\t\treturn\n434\t\t}\n435\t\n436\t\t// Canary monitor is authoritative when running.\n437\t\tif s.canary != nil && s.canaryStarted {\n438\t\t\tif !s.canary.IsHealthy() {\n439\t\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusServiceUnavailable)\n440\t\t\t\tw.Write([]byte(\"Not ready - canary check failed\"))\n441\t\t\t\treturn\n442\t\t\t}\n443\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n444\t\t\tw.Write([]byte(\"Ready\"))\n445\t\t\treturn\n446\t\t}\n447\t\n448\t\t// Fallback: manifest writer's last successful delta flush.\n449\t\t// A flush within the last 60 seconds indicates the service is healthy.\n450\t\tconst flushThreshold = 60 * time.Second\n451\t\tif s.manifestWriter != nil {\n452\t\t\tlastFlush := s.manifestWriter.LastFlush()\n453\t\t\tif !lastFlush.IsZero() && time.Since(lastFlush) < flushThreshold {\n454\t\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n455\t\t\t\tw.Write([]byte(\"Ready\"))\n456\t\t\t\treturn\n457\t\t\t}\n458\t\t\t// No recent flush — report unhealthy\n459\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusServiceUnavailable)\n460\t\t\tif lastFlush.IsZero() {\n461\t\t\t\tw.Write([]byte(\"Not ready - manifest writer has never flushed\"))\n462\t\t\t} else {\n463\t\t\t\tw.Write([]byte(fmt.Sprintf(\"Not ready - manifest writer last flush %v ago (threshold %v)\", time.Since(lastFlush).Round(time.Second), flushThreshold)))\n464\t\t\t}\n465\t\t\treturn\n466\t\t}\n467\t\n468\t\t// Neither canary nor manifest writer available — report unhealthy.\n469\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusServiceUnavailable)\n470\t\tw.Write([]byte(\"Not ready - no health signal available\"))\n471\t}\n472\t\n473\t// verifyKey verifies the MEK is correct.\n474\tfunc (s *Server) verifyKey(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n475\t\tif r.Method != http.MethodGet {\n476\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Method not allowed\", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)\n477\t\t\treturn\n478\t\t}\n479\t\n480\t\tif s.canary == nil {\n481\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n482\t\t\tw.Write([]byte(`{\"status\":\"unknown\",\"error\":\"canary monitor not configured\"}`))\n483\t\t\treturn\n484\t\t}\n485\t\n486\t\tstatus := s.canary.GetStatus()\n487\t\tif status.DecryptVerified && status.HMACVerified {\n488\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n489\t\t\tw.Write([]byte(`{\"status\":\"verified\",\"message\":\"MEK is correct\"}`))\n490\t\t\treturn\n491\t\t}\n492\t\n493\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusServiceUnavailable)\n494\t\tw.Write([]byte(`{\"status\":\"unverified\",\"error\":\"canary check failed - MEK may be incorrect\"}`))\n495\t}\n496\t\n497\t// rotateKey rotates the MEK.\n498\tfunc (s *Server) rotateKey(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n499\t\tif r.Method != http.MethodPost {\n500\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Method not allowed\", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)\n501\t\t\treturn\n502\t\t}\n503\t\n504\t\t// Read the new MEK from the request body\n505\t\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(r.Body)\n506\t\tif err != nil {\n507\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to read request body: %v\", err), http.StatusBadRequest)\n508\t\t\treturn\n509\t\t}\n510\t\tdefer r.Body.Close()\n511\t\n512\t\t// The new MEK should be a 32-byte hex-encoded string (64 hex chars)\n513\t\t// or raw 32 bytes\n514\t\tvar newMEK []byte\n515\t\tif len(body) == 64 {\n516\t\t\t// Hex-encoded\n517\t\t\tnewMEK, err = hex.DecodeString(string(body))\n518\t\t\tif err != nil {\n519\t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Invalid hex-encoded MEK\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n520\t\t\t\treturn\n521\t\t\t}\n522\t\t} else if len(body) == 32 {\n523\t\t\t// Raw bytes\n524\t\t\tnewMEK = body\n525\t\t} else {\n526\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\"Invalid MEK length: expected 32 bytes or 64 hex chars, got %d\", len(body)), http.StatusBadRequest)\n527\t\t\treturn\n528\t\t}\n529\t\n530\t\t// Create key rotator with the default key. Pass the manifest index so\n531\t\t// rotateObject can skip per-object HeadObject calls when the entry is cached.\n532\t\tdefaultKey := s.keyManager.DefaultKey()\n533\t\trotator := NewKeyRotator(s.backend, s.config.Bucket, defaultKey.MEK, newMEK, s.manifest)\n534\t\n535\t\t// Perform rotation\n536\t\tresult, err := rotator.Rotate(r.Context())\n537\t\tif err != nil {\n538\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)\n539\t\t\tjson.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]interface{}{\n540\t\t\t\t\"status\":  \"failed\",\n541\t\t\t\t\"error\":   err.Error(),\n542\t\t\t\t\"result\":  result,\n543\t\t\t})\n544\t\t\treturn\n545\t\t}\n546\t\n547\t\t// Update the server's MEK on success\n548\t\tif result.Status == \"completed\" {\n549\t\t\tif err := s.keyManager.UpdateDefaultKey(newMEK); err != nil {\n550\t\t\t\ts.logger.WithFields(map[string]interface{}{\n551\t\t\t\t\t\"error\": err.Error(),\n552\t\t\t\t}).Error(\"failed to update key manager after rotation\")\n553\t\t\t}\n554\t\t\t// Clear the metadata cache since DEKs are now wrapped with new MEK\n555\t\t\ts.cache.Clear()\n556\t\t}\n557\t\n558\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n559\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n560\t\tjson.NewEncoder(w).Encode(result)\n561\t}\n562\t\n563\t// exportKey exports the current MEK.\n564\tfunc (s *Server) exportKey(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n565\t\tif r.Method != http.MethodGet {\n566\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Method not allowed\", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)\n567\t\t\treturn\n568\t\t}\n569\t\n570\t\tif r.URL.Query().Get(\"confirm\") != \"yes\" {\n571\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Must include ?confirm=yes to export key\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n572\t\t\treturn\n573\t\t}\n574\t\n575\t\t// Export the default MEK as hex-encoded string\n576\t\tdefaultKey := s.keyManager.DefaultKey()\n577\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n578\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n579\t\tjson.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{\n580\t\t\t\"mek\":   hex.EncodeToString(defaultKey.MEK),\n581\t\t\t\"format\": \"hex\",\n582\t\t\t\"warning\": \"This key provides access to all encrypted data. Store securely.\",\n583\t\t})\n584\t}\n585\t\n586\t// canaryHandler returns the canary status.\n587\tfunc (s *Server) canaryHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n588\t\tif r.Method != http.MethodGet {\n589\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Method not allowed\", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)\n590\t\t\treturn\n591\t\t}\n592\t\n593\t\tif s.canary == nil {\n594\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n595\t\t\tw.Write([]byte(`{\"status\":\"unknown\",\"error\":\"canary monitor not configured\"}`))\n596\t\t\treturn\n597\t\t}\n598\t\n599\t\tstatus := s.canary.GetStatus()\n600\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n601\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n602\t\tjson.NewEncoder(w).Encode(status)\n603\t}\n604\t\n605\t// audit returns the audit status.\n606\tfunc (s *Server) audit(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n607\t\tif r.Method != http.MethodGet {\n608\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Method not allowed\", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)\n609\t\t\treturn\n610\t\t}\n611\t\n612\t\t// Create auditor and perform audit\n613\t\tauditor := provenance.NewAuditor(s.backend, s.config.Bucket)\n614\t\tresult, err := auditor.Audit(r.Context())\n615\t\tif err != nil {\n616\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)\n617\t\t\tjson.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]interface{}{\n618\t\t\t\t\"status\": \"error\",\n619\t\t\t\t\"error\":   err.Error(),\n620\t\t\t})\n621\t\t\treturn\n622\t\t}\n623\t\n624\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n625\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n626\t\tjson.NewEncoder(w).Encode(result)\n627\t}\n628\t\n629\t// wrapHandler wraps a handler with common middleware.\n630\tfunc (s *Server) wrapHandler(h http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\n631\t\treturn func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n632\t\t\tstart := time.Now()\n633\t\n634\t\t\t// Track in-flight request\n635\t\t\ts.requestTracker.Start()\n636\t\t\tdefer s.requestTracker.End()\n637\t\n638\t\t\t// Log request\n639\t\t\ts.logger.WithFields(map[string]interface{}{\n640\t\t\t\t\"method\": r.Method,\n641\t\t\t\t\"path\":   r.URL.Path,\n642\t\t\t}).Debug(\"incoming request\")\n643\t\n644\t\t\t// Add CORS headers for browser clients\n645\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Access-Control-Allow-Origin\", \"*\")\n646\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Access-Control-Allow-Methods\", \"GET, PUT, DELETE, HEAD, POST, OPTIONS\")\n647\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Access-Control-Allow-Headers\", \"Authorization, Content-Type, Range, Content-Length\")\n648\t\n649\t\t\t// Handle preflight\n650\t\t\tif r.Method == http.MethodOptions {\n651\t\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n652\t\t\t\treturn\n653\t\t\t}\n654\t\n655\t\t\t// Verify auth for non-public endpoints\n656\t\t\tif !s.isPublicPath(r.URL.Path) {\n657\t\t\t\tcred, err := s.verifyAuthAndGetCredential(r)\n658\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n659\t\t\t\t\ts.writeError(w, \"AccessDenied\", \"Invalid credentials\", 403)\n660\t\t\t\t\ts.metrics.IncRequestsTotal(\"auth\", 403)\n661\t\t\t\t\treturn\n662\t\t\t\t}\n663\t\t\t\t// Check ACL for the request. For list operations the URL path has no\n664\t\t\t\t// key component, so fall back to the ?prefix query param so that ACL\n665\t\t\t\t// prefix restrictions are enforced correctly against the listed prefix.\n666\t\t\t\tbucket, key := s.extractBucketAndKey(r)\n667\t\t\t\tif key == \"\" {\n668\t\t\t\t\tkey = r.URL.Query().Get(\"prefix\")\n669\t\t\t\t}\n670\t\t\t\tif err := CheckACL(cred, bucket, key); err != nil {\n671\t\t\t\t\ts.writeError(w, \"AccessDenied\", \"Access Denied\", 403)\n672\t\t\t\t\ts.metrics.IncRequestsTotal(\"acl\", 403)\n673\t\t\t\t\treturn\n674\t\t\t\t}\n675\t\t\t}\n676\t\n677\t\t\t// Use a response writer wrapper to capture status code\n678\t\t\trw := &responseWriter{ResponseWriter: w, statusCode: http.StatusOK}\n679\t\n680\t\t\th(rw, r)\n681\t\n682\t\t\t// Record metrics\n683\t\t\tduration := time.Since(start)\n684\t\t\ts.metrics.IncRequestsTotal(r.Method, rw.statusCode)\n685\t\t\ts.metrics.RecordRequestDuration(r.Method, duration)\n686\t\n687\t\t\t// Log completed request\n688\t\t\ts.logger.WithFields(map[string]interface{}{\n689\t\t\t\t\"method\":      r.Method,\n690\t\t\t\t\"path\":        r.URL.Path,\n691\t\t\t\t\"status\":      rw.statusCode,\n692\t\t\t\t\"duration_ms\": duration.Milliseconds(),\n693\t\t\t}).Info(\"request completed\")\n694\t\t}\n695\t}\n696\t\n697\t// responseWriter wraps http.ResponseWriter to capture the status code.\n698\ttype responseWriter struct {\n699\t\thttp.ResponseWriter\n700\t\tstatusCode int\n701\t}\n702\t\n703\t// WriteHeader captures the status code.\n704\tfunc (rw *responseWriter) WriteHeader(code int) {\n705\t\trw.statusCode = code\n706\t\trw.ResponseWriter.WriteHeader(code)\n707\t}\n708\t\n709\t// isPublicPath checks if a path is public (no auth required).\n710\tfunc (s *Server) isPublicPath(path string) bool {\n711\t\treturn path == \"/healthz\" || path == \"/readyz\"\n712\t}\n713\t\n714\t// verifyAuthAndGetCredential validates AWS SigV4 authentication and returns the credential.\n715\tfunc (s *Server) verifyAuthAndGetCredential(r *http.Request) (*config.Credential, error) {\n716\t\t// Create auth with all credentials\n717\t\tauth := NewSigV4AuthWithCredentials(s.config.Credentials, s.config.B2Region)\n718\t\n719\t\t// Check for query-based auth (presigned URLs)\n720\t\tif r.URL.Query().Get(\"X-Amz-Credential\") != \"\" {\n721\t\t\treturn auth.VerifyQueryAuth(r)\n722\t\t}\n723\t\n724\t\t// Check for header-based auth\n725\t\tauthHeader := r.Header.Get(\"Authorization\")\n726\t\tif authHeader == \"\" {\n727\t\t\treturn nil, ErrMissingAuthHeader\n728\t\t}\n729\t\n730\t\t// Pass nil body — buildCanonicalRequest uses x-amz-content-sha256 header\n731\t\t// when present (which covers all AWS SDK/CLI requests), falling back to\n732\t\t// sha256(body) for requests without that header.\n733\t\treturn auth.VerifyRequest(r, nil)\n734\t}\n735\t\n736\t// extractBucketAndKey extracts bucket and key from the request URL.\n737\tfunc (s *Server) extractBucketAndKey(r *http.Request) (bucket, key string) {\n738\t\tpath := r.URL.Path\n739\t\t// Remove leading slash\n740\t\tpath = strings.TrimPrefix(path, \"/\")\n741\t\n742\t\t// Check for virtual-hosted-style (bucket in host)\n743\t\t// For path-style: /bucket/key\n744\t\tparts := strings.SplitN(path, \"/\", 2)\n745\t\tif len(parts) >= 1 {\n746\t\t\tbucket = parts[0]\n747\t\t}\n748\t\tif len(parts) >= 2 {\n749\t\t\tkey = parts[1]\n750\t\t}\n751\t\n752\t\t// Use configured bucket if empty\n753\t\tif bucket == \"\" {\n754\t\t\tbucket = s.config.Bucket\n755\t\t}\n756\t\n757\t\treturn bucket, key\n758\t}\n759\t\n760\t// writeError writes an S3 error response.\n761\tfunc (s *Server) writeError(w http.ResponseWriter, code, message string, statusCode int) {\n762\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/xml\")\n763\t\tw.WriteHeader(statusCode)\n764\t\tvar codeBuf, msgBuf bytes.Buffer\n765\t\txml.EscapeText(&codeBuf, []byte(code))\n766\t\txml.EscapeText(&msgBuf, []byte(message))\n767\t\tfmt.Fprintf(w, `<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>`+\"\\n<Error>\\n  <Code>%s</Code>\\n  <Message>%s</Message>\\n</Error>\",\n768\t\t\tcodeBuf.String(), msgBuf.String())\n769\t}\n770\t\n771\t// GenerateDEK generates a new DEK (exposed for handlers).\n772\tfunc (s *Server) GenerateDEK() ([]byte, error) {\n773\t\treturn crypto.GenerateDEK()\n774\t}\n775\t\n776\t// GenerateIV generates a new IV (exposed for handlers).\n777\tfunc (s *Server) GenerateIV() ([]byte, error) {\n778\t\treturn crypto.GenerateIV()\n779\t}\n780\t\n781\t// WaitForInFlightRequests waits for all in-flight requests to complete.\n782\tfunc (s *Server) WaitForInFlightRequests() {\n783\t\ts.requestTracker.Wait()\n784\t}\n785\t\n786\t// InFlightRequestCount returns the current number of in-flight requests.\n787\tfunc (s *Server) InFlightRequestCount() int64 {\n788\t\treturn s.requestTracker.Count()\n789\t}\n790\t\n791\t// handlePresign generates a pre-signed URL for sharing encrypted files.\n792\t// POST /admin/presign\n793\t// Body: {\"bucket\": \"my-bucket\", \"key\": \"path/to/file.parquet\", \"expires_in\": \"1h\", \"content_disposition\": \"attachment; filename=\\\"file.parquet\\\"\"}\n794\tfunc (s *Server) handlePresign(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n795\t\tif r.Method != http.MethodPost {\n796\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Method not allowed\", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)\n797\t\t\treturn\n798\t\t}\n799\t\n800\t\t// Verify auth\n801\t\tcred, err := s.verifyAuthAndGetCredential(r)\n802\t\tif err != nil {\n803\t\t\ts.writeError(w, \"AccessDenied\", \"Invalid credentials\", 403)\n804\t\t\treturn\n805\t\t}\n806\t\n807\t\t// Parse request body\n808\t\tvar req struct {\n809\t\t\tBucket             string `json:\"bucket\"`\n810\t\t\tKey                string `json:\"key\"`\n811\t\t\tExpiresIn          string `json:\"expires_in\"`\n812\t\t\tContentDisposition string `json:\"content_disposition\"`\n813\t\t\tRange              string `json:\"range\"`\n814\t\t}\n815\t\n816\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n817\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\"Invalid request body: %v\", err), http.StatusBadRequest)\n818\t\t\treturn\n819\t\t}\n820\t\n821\t\t// Use configured bucket if not specified\n822\t\tbucket := req.Bucket\n823\t\tif bucket == \"\" {\n824\t\t\tbucket = s.config.Bucket\n825\t\t}\n826\t\n827\t\t// Validate required fields\n828\t\tif req.Key == \"\" {\n829\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"key is required\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n830\t\t\treturn\n831\t\t}\n832\t\n833\t\t// Check ACL for the request\n834\t\tif err := CheckACL(cred, bucket, req.Key); err != nil {\n835\t\t\ts.writeError(w, \"AccessDenied\", \"Access Denied\", 403)\n836\t\t\treturn\n837\t\t}\n838\t\n839\t\t// Parse expiration (default 1 hour)\n840\t\texpiration := presign.DefaultExpiration\n841\t\tif req.ExpiresIn != \"\" {\n842\t\t\texpiration, err = presign.ParseExpiration(req.ExpiresIn)\n843\t\t\tif err != nil {\n844\t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\"Invalid expires_in: %v\", err), http.StatusBadRequest)\n845\t\t\t\treturn\n846\t\t\t}\n847\t\t}\n848\t\n849\t\t// Build options\n850\t\tvar opts []presign.Option\n851\t\tif req.ContentDisposition != \"\" {\n852\t\t\topts = append(opts, presign.WithContentDisposition(req.ContentDisposition))\n853\t\t}\n854\t\tif req.Range != \"\" {\n855\t\t\topts = append(opts, presign.WithRange(req.Range))\n856\t\t}\n857\t\n858\t\t// Generate pre-signed URL\n859\t\tshareURL, err := s.presigner.GenerateURL(bucket, req.Key, expiration, opts...)\n860\t\tif err != nil {\n861\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to generate URL: %v\", err), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n862\t\t\treturn\n863\t\t}\n864\t\n865\t\t// Return response\n866\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n867\t\tjson.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]interface{}{\n868\t\t\t\"url\":       shareURL,\n869\t\t\t\"expires_in\": presign.FormatExpiration(expiration),\n870\t\t\t\"expires_at\": time.Now().Add(expiration).UTC().Format(time.RFC3339),\n871\t\t})\n872\t}\n873\t\n874\t// handleShare serves decrypted content from a pre-signed URL token.\n875\t// GET /share/<token>\n876\tfunc (s *Server) handleShare(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n877\t\tif r.Method != http.MethodGet {\n878\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Method not allowed\", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)\n879\t\t\treturn\n880\t\t}\n881\t\n882\t\t// Extract token from path\n883\t\ttokenStr := presign.ParseTokenFromPath(r.URL.Path)\n884\t\tif tokenStr == \"\" {\n885\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Missing token\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n886\t\t\treturn\n887\t\t}\n888\t\n889\t\t// Verify token\n890\t\ttoken, err := s.presigner.VerifyToken(tokenStr)\n891\t\tif err != nil {\n892\t\t\tif errors.Is(err, presign.ErrExpiredToken) {\n893\t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Link expired\", http.StatusGone)\n894\t\t\t\treturn\n895\t\t\t}\n896\t\t\tif errors.Is(err, presign.ErrInvalidSignature) {\n897\t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Invalid link\", http.StatusForbidden)\n898\t\t\t\treturn\n899\t\t\t}\n900\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Invalid token\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n901\t\t\treturn\n902\t\t}\n903\t\n904\t\t// Get object metadata\n905\t\tctx := r.Context()\n906\t\tinfo, err := s.backend.Head(ctx, token.Bucket, token.Key)\n907\t\tif err != nil {\n908\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\"Object not found: %v\", err), http.StatusNotFound)\n909\t\t\treturn\n910\t\t}\n911\t\n912\t\t// Check if object is ARMOR-encrypted\n913\t\tif !info.IsARMOREncrypted {\n914\t\t\t// Serve non-ARMOR objects directly (passthrough)\n915\t\t\tbody, _, err := s.backend.Get(ctx, token.Bucket, token.Key)\n916\t\t\tif err != nil {\n917\t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to get object: %v\", err), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n918\t\t\t\treturn\n919\t\t\t}\n920\t\t\tdefer body.Close()\n921\t\n922\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Length\", fmt.Sprintf(\"%d\", info.Size))\n923\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", info.ContentType)\n924\t\t\tif token.ContentDisposition != \"\" {\n925\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Disposition\", token.ContentDisposition)\n926\t\t\t}\n927\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n928\t\t\tio.Copy(w, body)\n929\t\t\treturn\n930\t\t}\n931\t\n932\t\t// Parse ARMOR metadata\n933\t\tarmorMeta, ok := backend.ParseARMORMetadata(info.Metadata)\n934\t\tif !ok {\n935\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Failed to parse object metadata\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n936\t\t\treturn\n937\t\t}\n938\t\n939\t\t// Get the MEK for this object\n940\t\tmek, err := s.keyManager.GetMEKByID(armorMeta.KeyID)\n941\t\tif err != nil {\n942\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Failed to get decryption key\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n943\t\t\treturn\n944\t\t}\n945\t\n946\t\t// Unwrap DEK\n947\t\tdek, err := crypto.UnwrapDEK(mek, armorMeta.WrappedDEK)\n948\t\tif err != nil {\n949\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Failed to unwrap DEK\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n950\t\t\treturn\n951\t\t}\n952\t\n953\t\t// Create decryptor\n954\t\tdecryptor, err := crypto.NewDecryptor(dek, armorMeta.IV, armorMeta.BlockSize)\n955\t\tif err != nil {\n956\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Failed to create decryptor\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n957\t\t\treturn\n958\t\t}\n959\t\n960\t\t// Set response headers\n961\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Length\", fmt.Sprintf(\"%d\", armorMeta.PlaintextSize))\n962\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", armorMeta.ContentType)\n963\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Accept-Ranges\", \"bytes\")\n964\t\tif token.ContentDisposition != \"\" {\n965\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Disposition\", token.ContentDisposition)\n966\t\t}\n967\t\n968\t\t// Handle range request if specified in token or header\n969\t\trangeHeader := token.Range\n970\t\tif rangeHeader == \"\" {\n971\t\t\trangeHeader = r.Header.Get(\"Range\")\n972\t\t}\n973\t\n974\t\tif rangeHeader != \"\" {\n975\t\t\ts.handleShareRangeRequest(w, r, token, decryptor, armorMeta, rangeHeader)\n976\t\t\treturn\n977\t\t}\n978\t\n979\t\t// Full object download\n980\t\ts.handleShareFullObject(w, r, token, decryptor, armorMeta)\n981\t}\n982\t\n983\t// handleShareFullObject handles full object downloads for share endpoint.\n984\tfunc (s *Server) handleShareFullObject(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, token *presign.Token, decryptor *crypto.Decryptor, armorMeta *backend.ARMORMetadata) {\n985\t\tctx := r.Context()\n986\t\n987\t\tblockSize := armorMeta.BlockSize\n988\t\tblockCount := int(crypto.ComputeBlockCount(armorMeta.PlaintextSize, blockSize))\n989\t\tplaintextSize := armorMeta.PlaintextSize\n990\t\n991\t\t// Calculate offsets\n992\t\thmacTableOffset := crypto.HeaderSize + plaintextSize\n993\t\thmacTableSize := int64(blockCount) * crypto.HMACSize\n994\t\n995\t\t// 1. Prefetch HMAC table\n996\t\thmacBody, err := s.backend.GetRange(ctx, token.Bucket, token.Key, hmacTableOffset, hmacTableSize)\n997\t\tif err != nil {\n998\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to fetch HMAC table: %v\", err), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n999\t\t\treturn\n1000\t\t}\n1001\t\thmacTable, err := io.ReadAll(hmacBody)\n1002\t\thmacBody.Close()\n1003\t\tif err != nil {\n1004\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to read HMAC table: %v\", err), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1005\t\t\treturn\n1006\t\t}\n1007\t\n1008\t\t// 2. Stream data from Cloudflare\n1009\t\tstreamSize := crypto.HeaderSize + plaintextSize\n1010\t\tdataBody, err := s.backend.GetRange(ctx, token.Bucket, token.Key, 0, streamSize)\n1011\t\tif err != nil {\n1012\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to get object stream: %v\", err), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1013\t\t\treturn\n1014\t\t}\n1015\t\tdefer dataBody.Close()\n1016\t\n1017\t\t// 3. Read and discard header\n1018\t\theaderBuf := make([]byte, crypto.HeaderSize)\n1019\t\tif _, err := io.ReadFull(dataBody, headerBuf); err != nil {\n1020\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to read header: %v\", err), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1021\t\t\treturn\n1022\t\t}\n1023\t\n1024\t\t// 4. Write status before streaming\n1025\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\n1026\t\n1027\t\t// 5. Stream decrypt\n1028\t\tencryptedBuf := make([]byte, blockSize)\n1029\t\tfor blockIndex := 0; blockIndex < blockCount; blockIndex++ {\n1030\t\t\tremaining := plaintextSize - int64(blockIndex)*int64(blockSize)\n1031\t\t\tactualBlockSize := int(min64(int64(blockSize), remaining))\n1032\t\n1033\t\t\tencryptedBuf = encryptedBuf[:actualBlockSize]\n1034\t\t\tn, err := io.ReadFull(dataBody, encryptedBuf)\n1035\t\t\tif err != nil && err != io.EOF && err != io.ErrUnexpectedEOF {\n1036\t\t\t\treturn\n1037\t\t\t}\n1038\t\t\tif n == 0 {\n1039\t\t\t\tbreak\n1040\t\t\t}\n1041\t\t\tencryptedBuf = encryptedBuf[:n]\n1042\t\n1043\t\t\t// Verify HMAC\n1044\t\t\thmacOffset := blockIndex * crypto.HMACSize\n1045\t\t\tif hmacOffset+crypto.HMACSize > len(hmacTable) {\n1046\t\t\t\treturn\n1047\t\t\t}\n1048\t\t\texpectedHMAC := hmacTable[hmacOffset : hmacOffset+crypto.HMACSize]\n1049\t\n1050\t\t\tmac := hmac.New(sha256.New, decryptor.HMACKey())\n1051\t\t\tindexBytes := make([]byte, 4)\n1052\t\t\tbinary.BigEndian.PutUint32(indexBytes, uint32(blockIndex))\n1053\t\t\tmac.Write(indexBytes)\n1054\t\t\tmac.Write(encryptedBuf)\n1055\t\t\tcomputed := mac.Sum(nil)\n1056\t\n1057\t\t\tif !hmac.Equal(computed, expectedHMAC) {\n1058\t\t\t\treturn\n1059\t\t\t}\n1060\t\n1061\t\t\t// Decrypt\n1062\t\t\tdecrypted := make([]byte, n)\n1063\t\t\tctr := makeCounter(armorMeta.IV, uint32(blockIndex))\n1064\t\t\tstream := cipher.NewCTR(decryptor.CipherBlock(), ctr)\n1065\t\t\tstream.XORKeyStream(decrypted, encryptedBuf)\n1066\t\n1067\t\t\t// Write to client\n1068\t\t\tw.Write(decrypted)\n1069\t\t}\n1070\t}\n1071\t\n1072\t// handleShareRangeRequest handles range requests for share endpoint.\n1073\tfunc (s *Server) handleShareRangeRequest(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, token *presign.Token, decryptor *crypto.Decryptor, armorMeta *backend.ARMORMetadata, rangeHeader string) {\n1074\t\tctx := r.Context()\n1075\t\tplaintextSize := armorMeta.PlaintextSize\n1076\t\n1077\t\t// Parse range header\n1078\t\tstart, end, err := parseRangeHeader(rangeHeader, plaintextSize)\n1079\t\tif err != nil {\n1080\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Invalid range\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n1081\t\t\treturn\n1082\t\t}\n1083\t\n1084\t\t// Translate range to encrypted blocks\n1085\t\ttranslation, err := crypto.TranslateRange(start, end, plaintextSize, armorMeta.BlockSize, crypto.HeaderSize)\n1086\t\tif err != nil {\n1087\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to translate range: %v\", err), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1088\t\t\treturn\n1089\t\t}\n1090\t\n1091\t\t// Fetch encrypted blocks and HMAC table in parallel\n1092\t\tvar encrypted, hmacTable []byte\n1093\t\n1094\t\tg, gctx := errgroup.WithContext(ctx)\n1095\t\n1096\t\tg.Go(func() error {\n1097\t\t\tencryptedBody, err := s.backend.GetRange(gctx, token.Bucket, token.Key, translation.DataOffset, translation.DataLength)\n1098\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1099\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch encrypted blocks: %w\", err)\n1100\t\t\t}\n1101\t\t\tdefer encryptedBody.Close()\n1102\t\n1103\t\t\tencrypted, err = io.ReadAll(encryptedBody)\n1104\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1105\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to read encrypted blocks: %w\", err)\n1106\t\t\t}\n1107\t\t\treturn nil\n1108\t\t})\n1109\t\n1110\t\tg.Go(func() error {\n1111\t\t\thmacBody, err := s.backend.GetRange(gctx, token.Bucket, token.Key, translation.HMACOffset, translation.HMACLength)\n1112\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1113\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to fetch HMAC table: %w\", err)\n1114\t\t\t}\n1115\t\t\tdefer hmacBody.Close()\n1116\t\n1117\t\t\thmacTable, err = io.ReadAll(hmacBody)\n1118\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1119\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to read HMAC table: %w\", err)\n1120\t\t\t}\n1121\t\t\treturn nil\n1122\t\t})\n1123\t\n1124\t\tif err := g.Wait(); err != nil {\n1125\t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1126\t\t\treturn\n1127\t\t}\n1128\t\n1129\t\t// Decrypt range\n1130\t\tplaintext, err := decryptor.DecryptRange(encrypted, hmacTable, start, end, plaintextSize)\n1131\t\tif err != nil {\n1132\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to decrypt range: %v\", err), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1133\t\t\treturn\n1134\t\t}\n1135\t\n1136\t\t// Set response headers\n1137\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Length\", fmt.Sprintf(\"%d\", len(plaintext)))\n1138\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Range\", fmt.Sprintf(\"bytes %d-%d/%d\", start, end, plaintextSize))\n1139\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusPartialContent)\n1140\t\tw.Write(plaintext)\n1141\t}\n1142\t\n1143\tfunc min64(a, b int64) int64 {\n1144\t\tif a < b {\n1145\t\t\treturn a\n1146\t\t}\n1147\t\treturn b\n1148\t}\n1149\t\n1150\t// makeCounter creates a 16-byte counter value from the IV and block index.\n1151\tfunc makeCounter(iv []byte, blockIndex uint32) []byte {\n1152\t\tcounter := make([]byte, 16)\n1153\t\tcopy(counter[0:12], iv[0:12])\n1154\t\tbinary.BigEndian.PutUint32(counter[12:16], blockIndex)\n1155\t\treturn counter\n1156\t}\n1157\t\n1158\t// parseRangeHeader parses a Range header like \"bytes=0-1023\".\n1159\tfunc parseRangeHeader(header string, totalSize int64) (start, end int64, err error) {\n1160\t\tif !strings.HasPrefix(header, \"bytes=\") {\n1161\t\t\treturn 0, 0, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid range format\")\n1162\t\t}\n1163\t\n1164\t\trangeSpec := strings.TrimPrefix(header, \"bytes=\")\n1165\t\n1166\t\tif strings.Contains(rangeSpec, \",\") {\n1167\t\t\treturn 0, 0, fmt.Errorf(\"multiple ranges not supported\")\n1168\t\t}\n1169\t\n1170\t\tparts := strings.Split(rangeSpec, \"-\")\n1171\t\tif len(parts) != 2 {\n1172\t\t\treturn 0, 0, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid range format\")\n1173\t\t}\n1174\t\n1175\t\tif parts[0] == \"\" {\n1176\t\t\t// Suffix range: -500 means last 500 bytes\n1177\t\t\tsuffix, err := strconv.ParseInt(parts[1], 10, 64)\n1178\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1179\t\t\t\treturn 0, 0, err\n1180\t\t\t}\n1181\t\t\tstart = totalSize - suffix\n1182\t\t\tend = totalSize - 1\n1183\t\t} else {\n1184\t\t\tstart, err = strconv.ParseInt(parts[0], 10, 64)\n1185\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1186\t\t\t\treturn 0, 0, err\n1187\t\t\t}\n1188\t\t\tif parts[1] == \"\" {\n1189\t\t\t\tend = totalSize - 1\n1190\t\t\t} else {\n1191\t\t\t\tend, err = strconv.ParseInt(parts[1], 10, 64)\n1192\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n1193\t\t\t\t\treturn 0, 0, err\n1194\t\t\t\t}\n1195\t\t\t}\n1196\t\t}\n1197\t\n1198\t\tif start < 0 || start >= totalSize || end < start || end >= totalSize {\n1199\t\t\treturn 0, 0, fmt.Errorf(\"range out of bounds\")\n1200\t\t}\n1201\t\n1202\t\treturn start, end, nil\n1203\t}\n1204\t\n1205\t// handleB2Keys handles B2 application key management.\n1206\t// GET: List keys\n1207\t// POST: Create a new key\n1208\tfunc (s *Server) handleB2Keys(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n1209\t\tif s.b2keys == nil {\n1210\t\t\thttp.Error(w, `{\"error\":\"B2 key management not available - check B2 credentials\"}`, http.StatusServiceUnavailable)\n1211\t\t\treturn\n1212\t\t}\n1213\t\n1214\t\tswitch r.Method {\n1215\t\tcase http.MethodGet:\n1216\t\t\ts.listB2Keys(w, r)\n1217\t\tcase http.MethodPost:\n1218\t\t\ts.createB2Key(w, r)\n1219\t\tdefault:\n1220\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"Method not allowed\", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)\n1221\t\t}\n1222\t}\n1223\t\n1224\t// listB2Keys lists B2 application keys.\n1225\tfunc (s *Server) listB2Keys(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n1226\t\tcount := 100\n1227\t\tif c := r.URL.Query().Get(\"count\"); c != \"\" {\n1228\t\t\tif parsed, err := strconv.Atoi(c); err == nil && parsed > 0 {\n1229\t\t\t\tcount = parsed\n1230\t\t\t}\n1231\t\t}\n1232\t\tcursor := r.URL.Query().Get(\"cursor\")\n1233\t\n1234\t\tresult, err := s.b2keys.ListKeys(r.Context(), count, cursor)\n1235\t\tif err != nil {\n1236\t\t\ts.logger.WithFields(map[string]interface{}{\n1237\t\t\t\t\"error\": err.Error(),\n1238\t\t\t}).Error(\"Failed to list B2 keys\")\n1239\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(`{\"error\":\"Failed to list keys: %v\"}`, err), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1240\t\t\treturn\n1241\t\t}\n1242\t\n1243\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n1244\t\tjson.NewEncoder(w).Encode(result)\n1245\t}\n1246\t\n1247\t// createB2Key creates a new B2 application key.\n1248\tfunc (s *Server) createB2Key(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n1249\t\tvar req b2keys.CreateKeyRequest\n1250\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n1251\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(`{\"error\":\"Invalid request body: %v\"}`, err), http.StatusBadRequest)\n1252\t\t\treturn\n1253\t\t}\n1254\t\n1255\t\tif req.Name == \"\" {\n1256\t\t\thttp.Error(w, `{\"error\":\"name is required\"}`, http.StatusBadRequest)\n1257\t\t\treturn\n1258\t\t}\n1259\t\n1260\t\tif len(req.Capabilities) == 0 {\n1261\t\t\thttp.Error(w, `{\"error\":\"capabilities is required\"}`, http.StatusBadRequest)\n1262\t\t\treturn\n1263\t\t}\n1264\t\n1265\t\tkey, err := s.b2keys.CreateKey(r.Context(), &req)\n1266\t\tif err != nil {\n1267\t\t\ts.logger.WithFields(map[string]interface{}{\n1268\t\t\t\t\"error\": err.Error(),\n1269\t\t\t\t\"name\":  req.Name,\n1270\t\t\t}).Error(\"Failed to create B2 key\")\n1271\t\t\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(`{\"error\":\"Failed to create key: %v\"}`, err), http.StatusInternalServerError)\n1272\t\t\treturn\n1273\t\t}\n1274\t\n1275\t\ts.logger.WithFields(map[string]interface{}{\n1276\t\t\t\"key_id\": key.ID,\n1277\t\t\t\"name\": \"/admin/b2/keys/\")\n1299\t\tif keyID == \"\" || keyID == r.URL.Path {\n1300\t\t\thttp.Error(w, `{\"error\":\"key ID is required\"}`, http.StatusBadRequest)\n1301\t\t\treturn\n1302\t\t}\n1303\t\n1304\t\terr := s.b2keys.DeleteKey(r.Context(), keyID)\n1305\t\tif err != nil {\n1306\t\t\tif errors.Is(err, b2keys.ErrKeyNotFound)
